# Security Policy / 安全策略

## Reporting a Vulnerability / 报告漏洞

**Please do NOT report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**
**请不要通过公开的 GitHub issue 报告安全漏洞。**

Instead, report them privately using GitHub's
[Security Advisories](https://github.com/gocronx-team/gocron/security/advisories/new).

请改用 GitHub 的
[私密安全公告（Security Advisories）](https://github.com/gocronx-team/gocron/security/advisories/new)
进行上报。

Please include / 请尽量包含：

- A description of the vulnerability and its impact / 漏洞描述及其影响
- Steps to reproduce or a proof of concept / 复现步骤或 PoC
- Affected version(s) / 受影响的版本
- Any suggested mitigation, if known / 可能的缓解措施（如有）

We will acknowledge your report as soon as possible and work with you on a fix and
coordinated disclosure.
我们会尽快确认你的报告，并与你协作完成修复与协同披露。

## Supported Versions / 受支持的版本

Security fixes are provided for the latest released version. Please upgrade to the
latest release before reporting.
安全修复仅针对最新发布版本提供，上报前请先升级到最新版本。
